title: Resource Plan
description: Output from cgf-resource-architect: what resources to build, why, and in what order

plan_version.description: Version of this plan, incremented on each revision

spec_hash.description: Hash of SPEC.md used to detect when re-planning is needed

rationale.description: Why this set of resources was chosen to fulfill the SPEC capabilities

resources.description: Resources to generate, in any order (see generation_order for build sequence)

path.description: Relative path where this resource will be written (e.g., agents/iac-analyzer.md)

purpose.description: What this resource does and why it is needed

capabilities_served.description: Which SPEC capabilities this resource fulfills (at least one required)

depends_on.description: Paths of other resources that must be generated before this one

model.description: For agents: LLM model to use (sonnet, opus, haiku). Defaults to sonnet.

tools.description: For agents: tools to grant (e.g., Read, Write, Bash, Glob)

language.description: For mcp_tool/mcp_server: implementation language. Defaults to python.

priority.description: Build priority: 0 = no dependencies (build first), higher = depends on lower-priority items

generation_order.description: Resource paths in topological sort order (dependencies first)

rejected_proposals.description: Proposals from SPEC that were overridden, with justification

reason.description: Why the proposal was rejected or overridden
